what_it_does: AI that runs your company while you sleep. Autonomous business execution, overnight operations, multi-agent scaling.
operational_patterns: Company operations loop covering planning, coding, marketing
runtime_patterns: Persistent daemon mode with continuous execution
governance_patterns: Unknown — no public documentation on governance or safety bounds
execution_loops: Company operations loop: plan → execute → iterate → report
reusable_primitives: Overnight execution paradigm (queue evening, report morning)
redundancy_risk: MEDIUM — UMH has OrganismDaemon with autonomous_tick, PersistentLoop, and signal queue. The 'overnight execution' pattern maps directly to daemon + cron scheduling.
adaptation_priority: LOW for core — UMH already has daemon, tick, queue. MEDIUM for UX pattern — results-on-wake morning brief is partially implemented (morning_brief skill) but could be tighter.
eos_relevance: HIGH — EOS is the company-level projection. Polsia's 'runs your company' maps to EOS agent hierarchy (sales, ops, marketing agents).
trinity_relevance: MEDIUM — each Trinity product could have overnight execution loops
expected_leverage_gain: 0.15 — primary gap is the results-on-wake UX tightening and formal 'company operations loop' definition at the EOS projection layer
